# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-service-api
spec:
  hosts:
  - external-api.example.com
  addresses:
  - 203.0.113.10
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-service-db
spec:
  hosts:
  - external-db.example.com
  addresses:
  - 198.51.100.5
  ports:
  - number: 3306
    name: mysql
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-service-routing
spec:
  hosts:
  - external-api.example.com
  - external-db.example.com
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 443
    route:
    - destination:
        host: external-api.example.com
    - port:
        number: 443
    weight: 100
  - match:
    - port: 3306
    route:
    - destination:
        host: external-db.example.com
    - port:
        number: 3306
    weight: 100
